content:
Alok Singh and I write for the Centre for Health law and Policy, NUALS Kochi on "Reforming India's Surrogacy Law: Balancing Reproductive Autonomy and Surrogate Rights". 
A major shoutout to my co-author for being an incredible collaborator. 

Do give this paper a read!🍀
comment: A key challenge will be ensuring that legal safeguards for surrogates translate into meaningful agency on the ground, especially where economic vulnerability may influence consent and decision-making.
